fragments.rules:
DESIGN RULES (non-negotiable):
- Write like a $50M+ DTC art director, not a dropshipping copywriter.
- Headlines: specific, calm, confident. Ban: "revolutionary", "game-changer", "best ever", "don't miss".
- Subheadlines: one clear outcome for the customer.
- Colors: harmonious palette — never neon-on-neon. Luxury = muted; Bold = one loud accent only.
- Price in featured section must reflect sourcing margin (typically 2.5-3x unit cost).
- Populate homepage_sections.sections with FULL settings objects for every section.
- settings_data.current must mirror theme_colors using keys: color_primary, color_accent, color_background, color_surface, color_text_muted, color_accent_soft.
- image_generation_prompts: exactly 3 detailed Imagen prompts (hero lifestyle, product studio, lifestyle context).
  No text, logos, or faces in images. Specify lighting, lens, mood, materials.
fragments.section_schema:
SHOPIFY OS 2.0 SECTIONS — use these exact `type` values and setting keys in homepage_sections: 1. header (type: "header") settings: { "logo_text": "Brand name — short, memorable" } 2. hero (type: "hero-banner") settings: { "headline": "8 words max — confident, no exclamation spam", "subheadline": "1-2 sentences — benefit-led, premium tone", "button_label": "e.g. Shop the collection / Discover now", "hero_image_asset": "hero-1.jpg" } 3. trust (type: "trust-bar") settings: { "heading": "e.g. Why customers choose us", "point_1": "Free shipping / 30-day guarantee / etc.", "point_2": "...", "point_3": "..." } 4. featured (type: "featured-product") settings: { "title": "Product name", "description": "2-3 sentences — craftsmanship, outcome, not features list", "price": "$XX.XX", "compare_at_price": "$XX.XX optional", "product_image_asset": "product-1.jpg" } 5. testimonial (type: "testimonial") settings: { "quote": "Authentic-sounding customer quote", "author": "First name + city or role" } 6. about (type: "rich-text") settings: { "heading": "Our story / The brand", "body": "

HTML — 2 short paragraphs, mission + quality promise

" } 7. footer (type: "footer") settings: { "copyright_text": "© 2026 Brand. All rights reserved." } COLOR SYSTEM — theme_colors must include ALL keys (hex, WCAG-friendly): - primary: headers, nav, footer background - accent: CTAs, price highlights, links - background: page background - surface: cards, elevated panels (#f8f8f8 to #1a1a1a depending on tone) - text_muted: secondary body copy - accent_soft: subtle highlights, borders (10-20% lighter than accent) homepage_sections.order MUST be: ["header","hero","trust","featured","testimonial","about","footer"]
fragments.output_schema:
OUTPUT: Valid JSON only matching CommerceCreationOutput schema.
Required top-level fields:
{
  "theme_name", "theme_slug", "design_direction" (1 sentence art direction),
  "theme_colors": {primary, accent, background, surface, text_muted, accent_soft},
  "hero_headline", "hero_subheadline", "hero_button_label",
  "about_snippet", "collection_title", "collection_description",
  "trust_heading", "trust_points" (array of 3 short strings),
  "testimonial_quote", "testimonial_author",
  "product_handle", "collection_handle",
  "homepage_sections": { "sections": {...}, "order": [...] },
  "settings_data": { "current": {...} },
  "image_generation_prompts": [3 detailed Imagen prompts]
}

tone_aesthetics.Professional: Clean DTC aesthetic — confident, minimal, high trust. Think modern workspace brands: neutral palette, crisp typography, generous whitespace, subtle shadows.
tone_aesthetics.Playful: Energetic consumer brand — vibrant accent on soft neutral base, rounded feel, approachable headlines. Avoid childish clutter; stay conversion-focused.
tone_aesthetics.Luxury: Premium editorial — deep charcoal or warm ivory backgrounds, restrained accent (gold, burgundy, or forest). Short poetic headlines, whisper-quiet subcopy. Reference Aesop, Ridge, Our Place tier.
tone_aesthetics.Minimalist: Ultra-refined Scandinavian — monochrome + one accent, maximum negative space, no hype words, product-as-hero composition.
tone_aesthetics.Bold: High-contrast streetwear / performance — strong primary, electric accent, punchy uppercase headlines, urgency without cheap dropshipping clichés.
tone_aesthetics.Friendly: Warm lifestyle DTC — soft creams, approachable copy, community-first tone. Feels human, not corporate.

user_blocks.no_marketing: No Ad Creative run — infer premium positioning from product and brand brief only.

image_prompts.hero: Ultra-premium DTC ecommerce hero banner, product: {product_name}, category: {category}. Art direction: {direction}. Editorial lifestyle composition, soft directional lighting, shallow depth of field, muted neutral palette with single accent tone, 16:9 wide crop, photorealistic, no text, no logos, no watermarks, no human faces
image_prompts.product: High-end product photography, {product_name}, {tone} brand aesthetic. Studio catalog shot on seamless background, 85mm lens, crisp detail, soft shadow, commercial quality, no text, no logos
image_prompts.lifestyle: Lifestyle context shot featuring {product_name} in natural use environment, {direction}. Warm ambient light, aspirational but authentic, magazine editorial style, no text, no faces
